items.name: line-a-b-c
items.prompt: Roads connect A-B and B-C. The robot starts at A, the package starts at B, and the delivery goal is C. Return a valid list[str] plan using drive, pickup, and drop actions.

items.name: triangle-route
items.prompt: Roads connect A-B, B-C, and A-C. The robot starts at B, the package starts at A, and the delivery goal is C. Return a valid list[str] plan using drive, pickup, and drop actions.

items.name: chain-d-c-b-a
items.prompt: Roads connect D-C, C-B, and B-A. The robot starts at D, the package starts at D, and the delivery goal is A. Return a valid list[str] plan using drive, pickup, and drop actions.

items.name: branching-hub
items.prompt: Roads connect Hub-North, Hub-South, and South-East. The robot starts at North, the package starts at South, and the delivery goal is East. Return a valid list[str] plan using drive, pickup, and drop actions.
